properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v3 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Living in the overflow Covered by your love Moving with the Holy Ghost You're more than enough

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Walking in your freedom now Covered by your grace Witnessing your healing power We have been changed

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Bless the Lord, oh my soul I am living in the overflow Bless the Lord, oh my soul I am living in the overflow

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: God You are the sovereign one You've given us your name We declare your Kingdom come Forever you reign

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Living in the overflow The bound are now set free Everywhere we go we see The victory

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Ooh amazing God Your Spirit falls And now we walk In miracles
